derived_from.description: Supplementary reference: local development setup guide.

transforms.description: Each source record was manually rewritten as an instruction/response pair. Responses paraphrase record text without adding information not present in the source.
All generated pairs reviewed against source records for faithfulness.

quality_notes: All content is fictional placeholder data created for OKPF format demonstration only.
Examples are illustrative. They have not been evaluated for model improvement.
limitations: Fictional data only — not derived from a real software project.
Not tokenized for any specific model.
Not validated for production fine-tuning use.
Five examples are far too few for meaningful fine-tuning.
notices: Training use remains subject to the pack license (CC-BY-4.0) and usage_policy.
Review usage_policy.allow_fine_tuning before using this derivative for model training.
